name: Natural Procreative Hygiene
description: A conceptual framework addressing the biological and ethical principles governing natural human procreative hygiene.

additionalProperty.name: Physiological Integrity
additionalProperty.value: Recognition of the human reproductive system as a coherent biological structure with inherent hygienic requirements.

additionalProperty.name: Ethical Coherence
additionalProperty.value: Alignment of procreative practices with ethical frameworks derived from natural function rather than circumvention of it.

additionalProperty.name: Preventive Orientation
additionalProperty.value: Emphasis on prophylactic understanding — hygiene as prevention rather than remediation.

additionalProperty.name: Intergenerational Responsibility
additionalProperty.value: Consideration of procreative hygiene as a duty extending across generations.
